title: cyphia longifolia
intro: Cyphia longifolia, also known as Cyphium or Spurge-flower, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cyphia longifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies and traditional medicine.
